ksa_text: Knowledge of data and AI due diligence frameworks for mergers, acquisitions, and private equity transactions, including data asset valuation, technical debt assessment, key person risk evaluation, and integration complexity analysis.

dcwf.top_element_label: Ensure that AI design and development activities are properly documented and updated.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Although Leadership & Strategy is an edge domain for the Director of Master Data Management, this knowledge KSA presents sufficient signal (composite score 0.489) and conceptual alignment to include at the director level.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Leadership & Strategy), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.489). External reviewers may question whether this specific knowledge KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Director of Master Data Management versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: McKinsey, Gartner, and Harvard Business Review consistently identify leadership and strategy skills as core differentiators for C-suite and VP data leaders.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Leadership & Strategy appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Director of Master Data Management.

decision_rationale: Edge-domain Leadership & Strategy knowledge KSA cleared adversarial review with score 0.489. Included based on sufficient framework alignment and role relevance for the Director of Master Data Management.
